template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Six Cherry-profile keycap side silhouettes in a horizontal row, R1 (top-row) sculpt. Bodies filled in deep indigo navy matching the Masterpiece R2 rich blue (RAL 240 40 40 character, oklch(0.32 0.12 262) via gradient). Three caps carry near-white WS1-suggesting legend marks (short horizontal bars). Muted terracotta accent appears on the outer right edge of cap 1 and the outer left edge of cap 6, plus a focal dot at the top shoulder of the central cap 4. A very faint seigaiha (overlapping wave-scale) pattern fills the upper two-thirds of the canvas at ~5% opacity, suggesting the Wave deskmat. A soft terracotta radial wash sits behind the row center. Baseline hairline with a thin terracotta shadow below. Bronze theme dot at upper-right margin.
hue: deep indigo navy (oklch(0.32 0.12 262)) — matching GMK CYL Masterpiece R2 RAL 240 40 40
motif: seigaiha (Japanese overlapping wave-scale) — very faint background texture referencing the Wave deskmat, ~5% opacity indigo stroke

splash_color.name: muted terracotta
usage: Right-edge accent line on cap 1 (first of row)
Left-edge accent line on cap 6 (last of row)
Focal dot at top shoulder of cap 4 (center)
Soft radial wash behind row center (fill-opacity 0.10 → 0.04)
Thin dashed framing line above cap row (stroke-opacity 0.22)
splash_color.rationale: Muted terracotta chosen over coral and dusty rose: it is warm without competing with the deep indigo bodies, maintains the shokunin (artisan) calm aesthetic, and recalls the warm clay / lacquerware tones common in Japanese craft objects. Coral would have been too loud against the deep navy; dusty rose too pink for the masculine craftsman theme.

keycap_color.name: deep indigo navy
keycap_color.rationale: Deep cool violet-leaning navy keyed to RAL 240 40 40, the rich blue of GMK CYL Masterpiece R2. Body gradient adds subtle depth (lighter top → darker base) to read as a physical object without shadow rendering.

legend_marks.rationale: Short horizontal strokes suggest WS1 white legends in an abstracted way without rendering actual glyphs. Varied opacities give depth: primary legend bar at full opacity, secondary reference bar lighter.

seigaiha.canvas_coverage: y=0 to y=416 (upper ~55% of 750px canvas), full width
seigaiha.notes: Standard seigaiha geometry: semicircles of radius r, alternating rows offset by r horizontally, stacked every r vertically. At 5% fill and 12% stroke the pattern reads as suggestion, not illustration.

bronze_accent.name: warm-bronze
bronze_accent.usage: Inner and outer circle at upper-right margin (cx=1148, cy=78, r=4 filled, r=8 ring at 40% opacity)

notes: Cherry R1 profile geometry: body trapezoid widens 8px front-to-back taper over 146px height (base 124px wide, top 110px wide). Front face leans rearward 6px from base to top shoulder; back face leans forward 4px — characteristic Cherry R1 backward-lean. CYL cylindrical scoop rendered as a 11px-dip concave arc across the top face interior. All six caps share the same body geometry; only legend marks and edge accents vary. Six-cap layout: 124px wide caps with 16px gaps, total row 824px, centered on 1200px canvas (x start=188). Transparent canvas (no background rect) so the SVG is light-mode safe on the warm-paper body or dark-mode safe on the charcoal background.
xml_validity: validated — no double-hyphen runs inside comments; parses as well-formed XML
